nodes.name: Olivaceous woodcreeper
nodes.summary: Olivaceous woodcreeper（Olivaceous woodcreeper，学名 Sittasomus griseicapillus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于次生林、Caatinga，常见栖息地包括成熟森林、灌丛。

nodes.name: 成熟森林
nodes.summary: 具备成熟林冠和树洞资源的森林生境。

nodes.name: Caatinga
nodes.summary: Caatinga是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联56种鸟类，包括白腹拟䳍、黄腿穴䳍、White-browed guan等56种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联749种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等749种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: sylviellus, southeastern and southern Brazil, southeastern Paraguay, and northeastern Argentina and Uruguay The olivaceous woodcreeper inhabits a variety of wooded landscapes, generally favoring all parts of mature forest but also occurring in secondary forest and plantations

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In drier areas it occurs in scrublands, caatinga, and cerrado

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: sylviellus, southeastern and southern Brazil, southeastern Paraguay, and northeastern Argentina and Uruguay The olivaceous woodcreeper inhabits a variety of wooded landscapes, generally favoring all parts of mature forest but also occurring in secondary forest and plantations

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: In drier areas it occurs in scrublands, caatinga, and cerrado
